description: You are a Wayfinding Consultant / Environmental Graphic Designer working on the FZK-Haus residential model in Bonsai (BlenderBIM). Based on the Wayfinding EIR document on the desktop, add emergency exit and room identification signage to the model. Create at least 4 IfcSign elements classified with at least 2 distinct IfcSignType definitions. Assign a custom property set named 'Pset_Signage' containing a 'SignText' property to each sign and ensure they are spatially contained within the building storeys. Save the model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_wayfinding.ifc.
